claim.statement: A bundle conjoining the deferred private R4 barrier with the live R2 W(3,3) <= 27 barrier -- deliberately mixing rungs to exercise min-trust propagation.
claim.negation_of: a counterexample to either the private R4 barrier or W(3,3) <= 27

rung.name: empirical-robust
trusted_base: min-trust = max(R4 deferred, R2, step R0) = R4
because one part is only an empirical R4 barrier, the whole bundle can be no stronger than R4

meta.demonstrates: composing with a deferred/weaker barrier propagates that weakness; the composite cannot certify above its weakest link

step.description: conjunction of a deferred R4 barrier and a live R2 barrier

provenance.pipeline: recursively re-checks both sub-barriers; one is DEFERRED, so the composite honestly reports DEFERRED

one_directional: This composite can never report CERTIFIED while a sub-barrier is deferred: the deferred R4 part short-circuits the composite to DEFERRED. That is the calculus working -- a chain is exactly as trustworthy as its weakest link.
